languages.text: "Тот, с кого писали портрет, был весьма неплох собой и изысканно одет".

traits.locale_text: "Тот, с кого писали портрет, был весьма неплох собой и изысканно одет".

languages.text: "The fellow in the portrait was rather handsome and sumptuously dressed."
languages.original_text: "Тот, с кого писали портрет, был весьма неплох собой и изысканно одет".

traits.locale_text: "The fellow in the portrait was rather handsome and sumptuously dressed."
"The fellow in the portrait was rather handsome and sumptuously dressed."
"The fellow in the portrait was rather handsome and sumptuously dressed."

languages.text: “画像上的那家伙相当英俊，穿得也非常气派。”
languages.original_text: "The fellow in the portrait was rather handsome and sumptuously dressed."

traits.locale_text: “画像上的那家伙相当英俊，穿得也非常气派。”

languages.text: «El tipo del retrato era bastante apuesto y vestía ropajes suntuosos».
languages.original_text: "The fellow in the portrait was rather handsome and sumptuously dressed."

traits.locale_text: «El tipo del retrato era bastante apuesto y vestía ropajes suntuosos».

languages.text: « Le type du portrait était plutôt bel homme et portait une tenue somptueuse. »
languages.original_text: "The fellow in the portrait was rather handsome and sumptuously dressed."

traits.locale_text: « Le type du portrait était plutôt bel homme et portait une tenue somptueuse. »

languages.text: "Der Mann auf dem Porträt war recht ansehnlich und prunkvoll gekleidet."
languages.original_text: "The fellow in the portrait was rather handsome and sumptuously dressed."

traits.locale_text: "Der Mann auf dem Porträt war recht ansehnlich und prunkvoll gekleidet."

languages.text: "Portredeki adam oldukça yakışıklı ve görkemli giyinmişti."
languages.original_text: "The fellow in the portrait was rather handsome and sumptuously dressed."

traits.locale_text: "Portredeki adam oldukça yakışıklı ve görkemli giyinmişti."

languages.text: 「肖像画の人物は、かなりハンサムで、贅沢な服装をしていた」
languages.original_text: "The fellow in the portrait was rather handsome and sumptuously dressed."

traits.locale_text: 「肖像画の人物は、かなりハンサムで、贅沢な服装をしていた」
